metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for coacher — a Claude Code plugin that primes Claude with a collaborator frame at session start.

plugins.name: coacher
plugins.description: Primes Claude with a peer-collaborator frame at SessionStart and provides /coacher:status, /coacher:audit, /coacher:reset, and /coacher:rant for mid-session integrity checks, CLAUDE.md conflict detection, re-anchoring, and raw-vent-to-productive translation.
